Hero.title: I design modern data platforms that turn complex migrations into reliable delivery systems.
Hero.subtitle: Experienced Computer Engineer specialized in lakehouse architecture, Snowflake ecosystems, Databricks pipelines and legacy-to-cloud modernization across AWS and Azure.
Hero.availability: Available for consulting, architecture and delivery leadership
Hero.imageCaption: Modernization mindset across batch, streaming, migration validation, orchestration and cloud-native execution.

metrics.label: years working across engineering, analytics and modern data platforms
cloud environments used to modernize legacy ecosystems and operational pipelines
experience building reliable pipelines with Spark, Kafka, Snowflake and Databricks

About.title: Architecture with delivery discipline.
About.intro: I combine hands-on engineering with architecture thinking, helping teams modernize data ecosystems without losing control of quality, standards or execution speed.
About.description1: My background includes Data Lakehouse implementations, Hadoop and database migrations, cloud-native ETL and ELT, and scalable pipelines built with Python, PySpark, Snowflake, Databricks, Glue, Kafka and Airflow.
About.description2: I work comfortably between strategy and execution: defining zones, standards, orchestration models, validation frameworks and release practices that keep data platforms maintainable as they scale.

focus.title: Modernization roadmaps
focus.description: From Hadoop, BigQuery, SQL Server or Teradata into modern stacks that reduce operational friction and improve scalability.

focus.title: Platform standards
focus.description: Definition of landing, staging and trusted zones, pipeline best practices, validation flows and engineering conventions for growing teams.

focus.title: Reliable delivery
focus.description: Automation using Docker, CI/CD, Git workflows, orchestration tools and testing-oriented approaches to keep releases predictable.

flowCards.title: Sources
flowCards.description: Hadoop, SQL Server, BigQuery, APIs and Kafka

flowCards.title: Ingestion + Validation
flowCards.description: Glue, Spark, DLT, QA frameworks and schema checks

flowCards.title: Lakehouse Core
flowCards.description: Databricks, Delta Lake, zones, standards and orchestration

flowCards.title: Serving Layer
flowCards.description: Snowflake, warehousing, analytics consumption and scalable access

Skills.title: A stack built for platform work, not just isolated pipelines.
Skills.description: My strongest value is connecting architecture, implementation and operational quality across the data lifecycle.
Skills.streamTitle: The stack moves like the platform itself
Skills.streamDescription: Multiple streams, different speeds, and hover-driven motion to make the technology layer feel active instead of static.

Contact.title: If you need migration leadership, platform architecture or senior delivery support, let's connect through WhatsApp.
Contact.description: WhatsApp is the primary contact channel here. You can also use the links below for direct contact.
Contact.whatsappText: Talk to me directly on WhatsApp
Contact.contactNote: If you prefer, you can still reach me by email, phone, LinkedIn or my public website.
